calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-21-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: La Von Granger. Petitioner sworn and examined. Court grants decree changing petitioner's name to Siu Yin Wong Yee. Order signed in open court.
